name: auth-service
description:
Handles user authentication and session management.
Supports OAuth2, SAML, and LDAP backends.

This service is the primary entry point for all
identity-related operations in the platform.
changelog:
v2.4.1 - Fixed token refresh race condition
v2.4.0 - Added SAML support
v2.3.0 - Introduced rate limiting
v2.2.0 - LDAP backend integration

name: data-pipeline
description:
Ingests, transforms, and routes event data
to downstream consumers.

Supports batch and streaming modes with
configurable windowing and backpressure.
changelog:
v3.1.0 - Added Kafka consumer group rebalancing
v3.0.0 - Breaking: new config format
v2.9.5 - Hotfix for memory leak in batch mode

name: notification-hub
description:
Unified notification delivery service.
Routes alerts via email, SMS, Slack, and webhooks.

Includes template engine for rich HTML emails
and digest/batching for high-volume scenarios.
changelog:
v1.8.0 - Webhook retry with exponential backoff
v1.7.0 - Added Slack thread support
v1.6.0 - Template engine v2 with Handlebars syntax
